Outreach Approval (founder approval required — never auto-sent)\n+    3. Diagnostic\n+    4. Offer\n+    5. Paid Sprint Simulation (SIMULATED status only — no real payment)\n+    6. Customer Workspace\n+    7. Proof Pack (skeleton — no fake result presented as real)\n+    8. Upsell\n+    9. Founder Daily Command\n+    + Governance gate (No External Action Without Approval)\n+\n+Hard rules enforced:\n+    - no real external sending\n+    - no fake proof presented as real\n+    - no guaranteed revenue\n+    - no customer name publishing\n+    - no WhatsApp automation\n+    - all external actions remain approval-required\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py\n+\n+Terminal markers:\n+    E2E_DRY_RUN_VERDICT=<verdict>\n+    DEALIX_E2E_DRY_RUN_OK=true|false\n+\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import csv\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+if str(REPO) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO))\n+\n+from scripts.create_customer_workspace import (  # noqa: E402\n+    COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES,\n+    create_workspace,\n+)\n+\n+DRY_RUN_CLIENT = \"dry-run-client\"\n+\n+\n+@dataclass\n+class Stage:\n+    key: str\n+    name: str\n+    core: bool\n+    passed: bool = False\n+    notes: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    def fail(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = False\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+    def ok(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = True\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+\n+def _read(rel: str) -> str:\n+    fp = REPO / rel\n+    return fp.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\") if fp.is_file() else \"\"\n+\n+\n+def stage_target() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"target\", \"Target\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    if not rows:\n+        s.fail(\"targets file has no rows\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"target list present ({len(rows)} seed rows); simulated target = '{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}'\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_outreach_approval() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"outreach\", \"Outreach Approval\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    # Approval gate is real only if nothing is auto-approved/sent.\n+    sent = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() in {\"sent\", \"auto\", \"auto-approved\", \"approved-auto\"}]\n+    if sent:\n+        s.fail(f\"{len(sent)} row(s) marked auto-sent/auto-approved — violates approval gate\")\n+        return s\n+    pending = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() == \"pending\"]\n+    s.ok(f\"approval queue present; {len(pending)} draft(s) pending founder approval; none auto-sent\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_diagnostic(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"diagnostic\", \"Diagnostic\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"02_diagnostic_summary.md\"\n+    script = REPO / \"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"02_diagnostic_summary.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not script.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"diagnostic record present in workspace; diagnostic script available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_offer(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"offer\", \"Offer\", core=True)\n+    scope = ws / \"03_command_sprint_scope.md\"\n+    offer_doc = REPO / \"docs/commercial/sales/P1_REVENUE_INTELLIGENCE_SPRINT_OFFER_AR.md\"\n+    if not scope.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"03_command_sprint_scope.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not offer_doc.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"Command Sprint offer doc missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"Command Sprint scope present in workspace; offer doc available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_paid_sim() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"paid\", \"Paid Sprint Simulation\", core=False)\n+    # In-memory simulated payment — explicitly NOT a real charge.\n+    simulated_status = \"SIMULATED-PAID (no real payment link, no charge)\"\n+    s.ok(f\"payment status simulated only: {simulated_status}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_workspace(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"workspace\", \"Customer Workspace\", core=True)\n+    missing = [f for f in COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES if not (ws / f).is_file()]\n+    if missing:\n+        s.fail(f\"missing workspace files: {', '.join(missing)}\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"all {len(COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES)} Command Sprint files present in customers/{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}/\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_proof_pack(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"proof\", \"Proof Pack\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"10_proof_pack.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"10_proof_pack.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    text = f.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")\n+    # Guard: a skeleton must NOT present any verified/achieved result.\n+    if \"✅\" in text and \"Verified\" in text:\n+        s.fail(\"proof pack appears to present a verified result in a dry run (fake proof risk)\")\n+        return s\n+    if \"Skeleton\" not in text and \"skeleton\" not in text:\n+        s.notes.append(\"note: proof pack does not self-identify as a skeleton\")\n+    s.ok(\"proof pack skeleton present; no fabricated/verified result asserted\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_upsell(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"upsell\", \"Upsell\", core=False)\n+    f = ws / \"11_upsell_recommendation.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"11_upsell_recommendation.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"upsell recommendation present (A2 — founder review before offering)\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_daily_command() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"daily\", \"Founder Daily Command\", core=False)\n+    out = REPO / \"reports/founder/daily_command.md\"\n+    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    out.write_text(render_daily_command(), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    s.ok(f\"founder daily command written: {out.relative_to(REPO)}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_governance() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"governance\", \"Governance\", core=True)\n+    gate = REPO / \"docs/03_governance/NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md\"\n+    policy = REPO / \"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md\"\n+    if not gate.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    if not policy.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    # The dry run itself performs zero external actions — assert that invariant.\n+    s.ok(\"No-External-Action gate present; dry run performed 0 external actions\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def render_daily_command() -> str:\n+    today = date.today().isoformat()\n+    return f\"\"\"# Founder Daily Command — {today}\n+\n+_Refreshed by `scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py`. The one screen to run the day._\n+\n+## 1. Today's single most important move\n+- [ ] _(decide one)_\n+\n+## 2. Awaiting your approval (A2/A3 — nothing sends without you)\n+- See `data/outreach/approval_queue.csv` — drafts pending founder approval.\n+\n+## 3. Pipeline at a glance\n+| Stage | Count | Next action |\n+| --- | --- | --- |\n+| Targets (seed) | see `data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv` | shortlist top 10 |\n+| Drafts pending approval | see approval queue | review + approve |\n+| Diagnostics booked | 0 | book first |\n+| Offers sent | 0 | — |\n+| Paid sprints | 0 | — |\n+| Proof packs delivered | 0 | — |\n+\n+## 4. Guardrails (always on)\n+- No auto-send. No cold WhatsApp. No guaranteed-revenue claims.\n+- No customer name published without written consent.\n+- Every external action is logged in the customer Approval Register.\n+\n+## 5. Next 5 founder actions\n+1. Review `reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md`.\n+2. Confirm E2E dry run verdict in `reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md`.\n+3. Shortlist top 10 from the first-30 targets.\n+4. Approve up to 5 outreach drafts (manual send only).\n+5. Book the first diagnostic.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render_report(stages: list[Stage], verdict: str) -> str:\n+    today = date.today().isoformat()\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Dealix E2E Dry Run\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"_Generated by `scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py` on {today}. \"\n+        \"Simulation only — no real external action, no real payment, no published name._\",\n+        \"\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, s in enumerate(stages, start=1):\n+        status = \"PASS\" if s.passed else \"FAIL\"\n+        lines.append(f\"## Stage {i} — {s.name}\")\n+        lines.append(status)\n+        for n in s.notes:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {n}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(\"## Verdict\")\n+    lines.append(verdict)\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(\"### Core stages (must PASS for Private Launch Ready)\")\n+    lines.append(\"Target · Outreach Approval · Diagnostic · Offer · Customer Workspace · Proof Pack · Governance\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines) + \"\\n\"\n+\n+\n+def compute_verdict(stages: list[Stage]) -> str:\n+    core = [s for s in stages if s.core]\n+    if not all(s.passed for s in core):\n+        return \"No-Go\"\n+    if all(s.passed for s in stages):\n+        return \"Private Launch Ready\"\n+    return \"Internal Only\"\n+\n+\n+def main() -> int:\n+    try:\n+        sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    except (AttributeError, OSError):",

Direct inspection showed the rest of the checklist was already satisfied on the branch base — `AGENTS.md`, `pyproject.toml`, `requirements.txt`, `scripts/check_env_contract.py`, `.claudeignore`, and the `.claude/`, `.codex/`, `.cursor/` agent configs all already exist. Codex needs no new repo file (it reads `AGENTS.md`).\n\nOnly two files were genuinely absent — this PR adds them.\n\n## What\n\n- **`CLAUDE.md`** (new, repo root) — a lean (~250 words, under the repo's own <500-token hygiene rule in `token-optimizer/02-claude-md/`) context lookup table. Points to `AGENTS.md` as the source of truth, lists the doctrine guard tests (non-negotiables), and uses **corrected** paths/commands vs. the older template (`api/routers/` not `api/routes/`, `core/config/`, `APP_ENV=test pytest`, real `make` targets). Every path and test it references was verified to exist.\n- **`.github/workflows/claude-code.yml`** (new) — `anthropics/claude-code-action@v1` that responds to `@claude` on issues, issue comments, PR review comments, and PR reviews. Authenticates via a **GitHub App token** (`actions/create-github-app-token@v2` from `APP_ID` + `APP_PRIVATE_KEY`) plus `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`. Mirrors `ci.yml` conventions (name, concurrency, timeout).\n\n## Required repo secrets (set in Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions)\n\nThe workflow only runs green once these exist:\n\n- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`\n- `APP_ID`\n- `APP_PRIVATE_KEY` (GitHub App with Contents / Issues / Pull requests = Read & Write)\n\nSetting secrets and installing the GitHub App are repo-settings actions performed in the GitHub UI — they cannot be committed.\n\n## Smoke test (after merge + secrets configured)\n\nOpen an issue titled **\"Claude smoke test\"** containing:\n\n> `@claude افحص الريبو بدون تعديل. قل لي فقط هل CLAUDE.md و AGENTS.md و GitHub Actions موجودة، وما هي أعلى 3 مخاطر P0.`\n\nExpected: the **Claude Code** workflow starts a run and Claude replies in the issue. The run should go green.\n\n## Verification done\n\n- `claude-code.yml` parses as valid YAML.\n- All paths and the six skill files referenced by `CLAUDE.md` exist.\n- All six doctrine guard tests referenced by `CLAUDE.md` exist.\n- Founder checklist now reports `OK` for `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `.github/workflows/claude-code.yml`.\n\n## Pre-existing CI failures (NOT caused by this PR)\n\nTwo checks from `.github/workflows/repository-hardening.yml` (untouched by this PR) fail on every PR for environmental reasons — by maintainer decision they are left as-is here:\n\n- **Gitleaks secret scan** — `gitleaks-action@v2` requires a paid `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` org secret (`[Dealix-sa] is an organization. License key is required`).\n- **Trivy filesystem scan** — `aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` is pinned to a tag that no longer resolves.\n\nThese are tracked separately from this change.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01JtuQhjxPpsGxUA95rhP6kk",

The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Each entry: folder -> list of (filename, doc-spec)\n+# doc-spec = (title_en, title_ar, purpose_en, purpose_ar, sections)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+def S(h: str, *bullets: str) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:\n+    return (h, list(bullets))\n+\n+\n+SYSTEMS: dict[str, list[tuple[str, tuple]]] = {}\n+\n+\n+# 1. Then `governance_os.decide` applies the 7-decision matrix (`ALLOW`, `DRAFT_ONLY`, `REQUIRE_APPROVAL`, `REDACT`, `BLOCK`, `RATE_LIMIT`, `REROUTE`).
.\docs\03_commercial_mvp\SPRINT_DELIVERY_PLAYBOOK.md:55:**Founder checkpoint:** review every BLOCK and every REDACT. The governance decisions log is part of the deliverable; clients buy the *audit trail*, not just the drafts. Confirm every draft is marked `draft_only` until the client explicitly approves each send.
.\docs\03_commercial_mvp\SPRINT_DELIVERY_PLAYBOOK.md:57:**Ledger entries:** `proof_ledger.drafts_generated = <n>`, `proof_ledger.governance_decisions = [...]`, `proof_ledger.blocked_count`, `proof_ledger.redacted_count`. No external send happens from Dealix infra (non-negotiables #2, #3, #8).
.\docs\03_commercial_mvp\SPRINT_DELIVERY_PLAYBOOK.md:63:**What runs:** `proof_os.assemble` builds the 14-section Proof Pack (intake, passport, DQ, dedupe, scoring, drafts, governance decisions, redactions, approvals, value-tier mapping, capital asset registration, limitations, methodology, signatures). Each section is required; missing sections fail the assembly.
.\docs\03_commercial_mvp\SPRINT_DELIVERY_PLAYBOOK.md:140:Each day of the sprint closes with three actions: (1) update the engagement record's `status_today` field, (2) commit any new ledger entries to the immutable ledger store, (3) send the client a one-paragraph daily bilingual status note (AR + EN) summarizing what ran, what's next, and whether any decision is needed from the client. Silence between days erodes trust faster than any single defect; the daily note is the cheapest insurance against silent failure.

.\reports\github-context\pr-623\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Intelligence-to-Revenue-to-Delivery OS\n### نظام الاستخبارات → الإيراد → التسليم\n\nThe company-wide daily machine — **not** just a targeting script. It connects the\nfull path from the first look at a company to renewal:\n\n```\nMarket research → company intelligence → compliance gate → scoring →\nweakness mapping → offer routing → drafts (founder-approval) → diagnostic →\npayment → delivery handoff → proof pack → upsell → learning loop ⟲\n```\n\nEvery company exits with one of three verdicts: **Target now / Nurture later /\nReject (with reason)**. Every company that pays exits with **Delivery Pack +\nProof Pack + Upsell Decision**.\n\n---\n\n### What's in this PR\n\n**Scripts** (`scripts/targeting_*.py`) — offline, deterministic, stdlib + PyYAML.\nNo network, no LLM, no scraping, so every output is reviewable and reproducible:\n\n| Stage | Script |\n|-------|--------|\n| Query factory (manual run) | `targeting_query_factory.py` |\n| Discovery (seed consolidation) | `targeting_discovery.py` |\n| Normalize / dedupe | `targeting_normalizer.py` |\n| Compliance gate | `targeting_compliance_gate.py` |\n| Scoring (0–100, auditable) | `targeting_scorecard.py` |\n| Weakness mapping | `targeting_weakness_mapper.py` |\n| Offer routing | `targeting_offer_router.py` |\n| Draft Lab (no auto-send) | `targeting_draft_lab.py` |\n| Daily founder brief (orchestrator) | `targeting_daily_brief.py` |\n| Delivery handoff (paid → customer folder) | `targeting_delivery_handoff.py` |\n| Learning loop (weekly retro) | `targeting_learning_loop.py` |\n| Shared helpers | `targeting_common.py` |\n\n**Config + sample data** — `data/targeting/`: `scoring_weights.yml`, `sectors.yml`,\n`cities.yml`, `signals.yml`, `blocked_sources.yml`, `company_master.jsonl`,\n`company_seed_template.csv`, `outcomes.jsonl`. Generated `out/` artifacts are\ngitignored; `customers/` delivery folders are gitignored (data-retention policy).\n\n**Docs** — `docs/01_go_to_market/` (Market Intelligence OS, Daily 400 loop,\nScorecard, Weakness Mapping, Offer Routing, Draft Lab, Shortlist rules, Delivery\nhandoff, Weekly retro), `docs/03_governance/` (research source, outreach approval,\nno-spam, robots & terms, prospect retention, external actions), `docs/04_delivery/`\n(Command Sprint delivery OS, customer folder template, proof pack template,\nacceptance criteria).\n\n**Tests** — `tests/test_targeting_{scorecard,compliance_gate,delivery_handoff,pipeline}.py`\n(28 passing).\n\n---\n\n### Non-negotiables enforced in code + tests\n\n- ❌ No messages sent automatically — Draft Lab stamps `AUTO_SEND: false`; `validate_draft` blocks it.\n- ❌ No scraping behind login; robots.txt + source terms respected (compliance gate).\n- ❌ No personal phone numbers / leaked data → hard reject with a reason.\n- ✅ Every target carries evidence (`minimum_evidence_count`).\n- ✅ Every draft requires founder approval.\n- ✅ Every paid target creates a delivery handoff (11-file customer folder).\n- ✅ Every delivery produces a proof pack (L1→L5).\n- ✅ Sensitive sectors held for governance review, never auto-targeted.\n\n---\n\n### Run it\n\n```bash\n# Daily brief (compliance → score → weakness → offer → drafts)\npython scripts/targeting_daily_brief.py --in data/targeting/company_master.jsonl --out data/targeting/out\n# After a company pays:\npython scripts/targeting_delivery_handoff.py --company \"Company Name\"\n# Weekly:\npython scripts/targeting_learning_loop.py --out data/targeting/out\n```\n\n### Verify\n\n```bash\npython -m pytest tests/test_targeting_scorecard.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_compliance_gate.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_delivery_handoff.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_pipeline.py -q\n```\n\n> Note: the canonical orchestrator is `targeting_daily_brief.py` (the spec's\n> `research_targeting_os.py` is realized as this end-to-end daily brief).\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA)_",

The gate encodes the Dealix non-negotiables:\n+\n+  - No scraping behind login / no CAPTCHA bypass / no leaked datasets.\n+  - Respect robots.txt and source terms.\n+  - No personal phone numbers; an official channel is required.\n+  - Sensitive sectors (gov / health / finance) require governance review.\n+  - Enough independent evidence to justify outreach.\n+\n+Output: each company is classified as ``approved``, ``review_required``\n+(sensitive sector held for a human governance sign-off), or ``rejected`` with an\n+explicit reason. Nothing silently drops — every reject carries a reason so the\n+decision is auditable.\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/targeting_compliance_gate.py \\\\\n+        --in data/targeting/company_master.jsonl \\\\\n+        --out data/targeting/out\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+import json\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from scripts.targeting_common import (\n+    COMPANY_MASTER,\n+    OUT_DIR,\n+    ensure_out_dir,\n+    load_blocked,\n+    load_companies,\n+)",

Every point has a reason, so a founder can see *why* a company scored\n+what it did. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Prospects come from the CSV you control (a clearly-labelled\n+    sample seed ships so the command runs out-of-the-box on a fresh clone).\n+  - No guaranteed outcomes / no invented metrics. \"referral\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class Prospect:\n+    name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    city: str = \"\"\n+    country: str = \"SA\"\n+    domain: str = \"\"\n+    contact_name: str = \"\"\n+    contact_title: str = \"\"\n+    source: str = \"manual_research\"\n+    locale: str = \"ar-SA\"\n+    annual_turnover_sar: int = 0\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = s(\"annual_turnover_sar\", \"0\").replace(\",\", \"\")\n+        try:\n+            turnover = int(float(turnover_raw)) if turnover_raw else 0\n+        except ValueError:\n+            turnover = 0\n+        return cls(\n+            name=s(\"name\"),\n+            sector=s(\"sector\").lower(),\n+            city=s(\"city\"),\n+            country=s(\"country\", \"SA\"),\n+            domain=s(\"domain\"),\n+            contact_name=s(\"contact_name\"),\n+            contact_title=s(\"contact_title\"),\n+            source=s(\"source\", \"manual_research\").lower(),\n+            locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+ 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+        icp=icp,\n+        dimensions=asdict(dims),\n+        decision=verdict.decision,\n+        qual_score=verdict.score,\n+        recommended_offer=verdict.recommended_offer,\n+        reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+ _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+ 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+ _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+        icp=icp,\n+        dimensions=asdict(dims),\n+        decision=verdict.decision,\n+        qual_score=verdict.score,\n+        recommended_offer=verdict.recommended_offer,\n+        reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, \"—\")\n+    )\n+    ar = [\n+        f\"الافتتاح: «لاحظت أن {p.name} في قطاع {p.sector} — نساعد شركات مثلكم على ترتيب الفرص وتنظيف البيانات تحت حوكمة AI واضحة.»\",\n+        f\"الربط بالألم: استند إلى ملاحظتك ({p.notes or 'تحديات متابعة العملاء'}).\",\n+        f\"العرض المقترح: {offer_ar} ({price}) — ابدأ صغير، أثبت القيمة، بدون وعود.\",\n+        \"الحوكمة كميزة: لا scraping، لا رسائل باردة، موافقتك قبل أي إجراء خارجي + Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"الخطوة التالية: احجز 20 دقيقة، أو ابدأ بالتشخيص المجاني خلال 24 ساعة.\",\n+    ]\n+    en = [\n+        f\"Open: “I noticed {p.name} in {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up gaps'}).\",\n+        f\"Recommend: {offer_en} ({price}) — start small, prove value, no promises.\",\n+        \"Governance as the edge: no scraping, no cold messaging, your approval before any external action + a Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"Next step: book 20 minutes, or start the free 24h diagnostic.\",\n+    ]\n+    if sp.decision in (\"reject\", \"refer_out\"):\n+        ar = [\"هذا المُرشّح غير ملائم الآن — اعتذر بلطف أو أحِله لشريك. لا تتابع.\"]\n+        en = [\"Not a fit right now — decline politely or refer to a partner. Do not pursue.\"]\n+    return ar, en\n+\n+\n+# ── Renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _gov_block(decision_summary: str) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"> **governance_decision:** `internal_artifact` · no external action taken · \"\n+        f\"{decision_summary}\\n>\\n> _{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], generated: str) -> str:\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Prospect shortlist — قائمة العملاء المحتملين (مُقيّمة ومرتّبة)\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **Source:** the prospect CSV you control. The shipped seed is a \"\n+        \"clearly-labelled **SAMPLE** — replace it with your real list \"\n+        \"(`data/prospects.csv`). No data was scraped.\\n\",\n+        _gov_block(\"ranking is a deterministic estimate from the fields you provided\"),\n+        \"\\n| # | Company | Sector | City | ICP | Verdict | Recommended offer |\\n\",\n+        \"|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\\n\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, sp in enumerate(scored, 1):\n+        p = sp.prospect\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"| {i} | {p.name} | {p.sector} | {p.city or '—'} | **{sp.icp}** | \"\n+            f\"{sp.decision} | {_offer_label(sp.recommended_offer)} |\\n\"\n+        )\n+    lines.append(\"\\n## Dimension detail\\n\")\n+    for i, sp in enumerate(scored, 1):\n+        d = sp.dimensions\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"\\n**{i}. {sp.prospect.name}** — ICP **{sp.icp}/100** · qual {sp.qual_score}/100 · \"\n+            f\"`{sp.decision}`\\n\"\n+            f\"- fit={d['b2b_service_fit']} · data={d['data_maturity']} · \"\n+            f\"gov={d['governance_posture']} · budget={d['budget_signal']} · \"\n+            f\"velocity={d['decision_velocity']}\\n\"\n+            f\"- reasons: {', '.join(sp.reasons) or '—'}\\n\"\n+        )\n+        if sp.doctrine_violations:\n+            lines.append(f\"- ⚠ doctrine: {', '.join(sp.doctrine_violations)}\\n\")\n+    lines.append(f\"\\n---\\n_{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\")\n+    return \"\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_csv(scored: list[ScoredProspect], out_path: Path) -> None:\n+    with out_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\") as f:\n+        w = csv.writer(f)\n+        w.writerow(\n+            [\n+                \"rank\",\n+                \"name\",\n+                \"sector\",\n+                \"city\",\n+                \"contact_name\",\n+                \"contact_title\",\n+                \"icp_score\",\n+                \"qualification_score\",\n+                \"decision\",\n+                \"recommended_offer\",\n+                \"b2b_service_fit\",\n+                \"data_maturity\",\n+                \"governance_posture\",\n+                \"budget_signal\",\n+                \"decision_velocity\",\n+                \"source\",\n+            ]\n+        )\n+        for i, sp in enumerate(scored, 1):\n+            p, d = sp.prospect, sp.dimensions\n+            w.writerow(\n+                [\n+                    i,\n+                    p.name,\n+                    p.sector,\n+ d[\"budget_signal\"],\n+                    d[\"decision_velocity\"],\n+                    p.source,\n+                ]\n+            )\n+\n+\n+def render_call_list_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], الحوار (عربي)\\n\"\n+        )\n+        for pt in ar_points:\n+            lines.append(f\"  - {pt}\\n\")\n+        lines.append(\"\\n### Talking points (English)\\n\")\n+        for pt in lines.append(\"\\n_No actionable prospects in this batch — add real rows to your CSV._\\n\")\n+    lines.append(f\"\\n_{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\")\n+    return \"\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def .\reports\github-context\pr-621\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Research & Targeting OS\n\nA repeatable, **governed** daily loop that turns seeds + allowlisted research into a scored, evidence-backed **target pool** — not an outbound blaster. **Quality over volume. No external send without founder approval.**\n\n> The \"400\" is a research/analysis pool, **not** 400 messages.\n\n### What it does\n1. Collect (seeds ± allowlisted discovery) → 2. Normalize (AR/EN names + domains) → 3. De-dupe (domain, then name; merge evidence) → 4. Attach evidence → 5. Score (100-pt model) → 6. Infer weakness → Dealix OS → 7. Recommend offer rung → 8. Emit raw pool / shortlist → 9. Build **review-only** drafts.\n\n### Scoring (100 pts)\nICP Fit 35 · Pain Signal 25 · Intent/Timing 20 · Access 10 · Evidence Confidence 10 · Risk Penalty −20 → grades A+/A/B/C/D.\n\n**Golden rule (enforced):** never target without **2 pain evidences OR a warm path** — otherwise the grade is capped at **B** and routed to a free Diagnostic.\n\n### Weakness → Dealix OS\nProof weakness→Proof OS · Follow-up leakage→Revenue OS · Delivery visibility→Delivery OS · Support recurrence→Support OS · Executive decision fog→Command OS · Data fragmentation→Data OS.\n\n### Governance / non-negotiables\n- Reuses the canonical doctrine guard `safe_send_gateway` + `governance_os.claim_safety`.\n- Allowed sources pinned in `data/targeting/source_allowlist.json`; **blocked sources hard-rejected and logged**.\n- No scraping behind login · no robots.txt/CAPTCHA bypass · no LinkedIn automation · no cold/bulk WhatsApp · no mass email · **no auto-send** · no claim without evidence.\n\n### Files\n| Path | Purpose |\n| --- | --- |\n| `scripts/research_targeting_os.py` | The engine (dependency-light, importable, CLI). |\n| `data/targeting/{company_seed_template.csv,queries.txt,source_allowlist.json}` | Inputs. |\n| `docs/go-to-market/RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS.md` | System spec (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/go-to-market/DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK.md` | Daily ritual (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/governance/PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY.md` | Binding policy (AR+EN). |\n| `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml` | 08:00 Riyadh; artifacts only; never sends. |\n| `tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` | 23 tests. |\n\n### Outputs (`data/targeting/out/`, gitignored)\n`ranked_targets.csv` · `ranked_targets.jsonl` · `daily_targeting_brief.md` · `drafts_for_review.md` · `weakness_map.md`\n\n### Run\n```bash\npython scripts/research_targeting_os.py \\\n  --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \\\n  --out data/targeting/out --top 50\n```\nOptional allowlisted discovery via `GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY` + `GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX` (graceful seed-only fallback when keys absent — reads public result metadata only, no scraping).\n\n### Tests\n`tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` — **23 passed, 1 skipped** (the skip runs from repo root). `tests/test_doctrine_guardrails.py` still passes. ruff + black (py311) clean on the new files.\n\n> Discovery provider can be swapped (Vertex AI Search / SerpAPI / Tavily / Brave) without changing the engine or the policy.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e)_",

No external action is taken without\n+    approval — this only records the inquiry and returns a confirmation.\n+\n+    Body: {name, company, email, phone, sector?, use_case?, data_readiness?,\n+           budget_band?, timeline?, description?, consent, website(honeypot)}\n+    Returns: {ok, lead_id?, governance_decision: \"allow\"}\n+    \"\"\"\n+    try:\n+        body = await req.json()\n+    except Exception as e:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"invalid_json\") from e\n+\n+    # Honeypot: if \"website\" field is filled, silently drop\n+    if body.get(\"website\"):\n+        log.info(\"custom_ai_request_honeypot_triggered\")\n+        return {\"ok\": True, \"governance_decision\": \"allow\"}\n+\n+    name = str(body.get(\"name\") or \"\").strip()\n+    company = str(body.get(\"company\") or \"\").strip()\n+    email = str(body.get(\"email\") or \"\").strip()\n+    phone = str(body.get(\"phone\") or \"\").strip()\n+    sector = str(body.get(\"sector\") or \"\").strip()\n+    use_case = str(body.get(\"use_case\") or \"\").strip()\n+    data_readiness = str(body.get(\"data_readiness\") or \"\").strip()\n+    budget_band = str(body.get(\"budget_band\") or \"\").strip()\n+    timeline = str(body.get(\"timeline\") or \"\").strip()\n+    description = str(body.get(\"description\") or \"\").strip()\n+    consent = bool(body.get(\"consent\"))\n+\n+    if not name or not company or \"@\" not in email or not phone:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"missing_required_fields\")\n+    if not consent:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"consent_required\")\n+\n+    # Fire PostHog event (fire-and-forget — never blocks response)\n+    try:\n+        await capture_event(\n+            \"custom_ai_requested\",\n+            distinct_id=email,\n+            properties={\n+                \"company\": company,\n+                \"sector\": sector,\n+                \"use_case\": use_case[:120],\n+                \"budget_band\": budget_band,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+                \"data_readiness\": data_readiness,\n+                \"description_len\": len(description),\n+                \"source\": \"landing.custom_ai_form\",\n+            },\n+        )\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"posthog_capture_failed\")\n+\n+    # Persist to local lead-inbox (gitignored var/lead-inbox.jsonl) so the\n+    # founder reviews every custom-AI inquiry in /api/v1/founder/leads.\n+    # Best-effort: failure never 5xx the public form.\n+    lead_id: str | None = None\n+    try:\n+        from auto_client_acquisition import lead_inbox\n+        rec = lead_inbox.append({\n+            \"name\": name,\n+            \"company\": company,\n+            \"email\": email,\n+            \"phone\": phone,\n+            \"sector\": sector,\n+            \"message\": description,\n+            \"consent\": consent,\n+            \"source\": str(body.get(\"source\") or \"landing.custom_ai_form\"),\n+            \"ref\": str(body.get(\"ref\") or \"\"),\n+            \"offer_interest\": \"custom_ai\",\n+            \"custom_ai\": {\n+                \"use_case\": use_case,\n+                \"data_readiness\": data_readiness,\n+                \"budget_band\": budget_band,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+            },\n+        })\n+        lead_id = rec.get(\"id\")\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"lead_inbox_append_failed\")\n+\n+    log.info(\n+        \"custom_ai_request_accepted email=%s company=%s sector=%s budget=%s lead_id=%s\",\n+        email,",

Persist to local lead-inbox (gitignored var/lead-inbox.jsonl) so the\n+    # founder reviews every custom-AI inquiry in /api/v1/founder/leads.\n+    # Best-effort: failure never 5xx the public form.\n+    lead_id: str | None = None\n+    try:\n+        from auto_client_acquisition import lead_inbox\n+        rec = lead_inbox.append({\n+            \"name\": name,\n+            \"company\": company,\n+            \"email\": email,\n+            \"phone\": phone,\n+            \"sector\": sector,\n+            \"message\": description,\n+            \"consent\": consent,\n+            \"source\": str(body.get(\"source\") or \"landing.custom_ai_form\"),\n+            \"ref\": str(body.get(\"ref\") or \"\"),\n+            \"offer_interest\": \"custom_ai\",\n+            \"custom_ai\": {\n+                \"use_case\": use_case,\n+                \"data_readiness\": data_readiness,\n+                \"budget_band\": budget_band,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+            },\n+        })\n+        lead_id = rec.get(\"id\")\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"lead_inbox_append_failed\")\n+\n+    log.info(\n+        \"custom_ai_request_accepted email=%s company=%s sector=%s budget=%s lead_id=%s\",\n+        _safe_log(email),\n+        _safe_log(company),\n+        _safe_log(sector),\n+        _safe_log(budget_band),",

.\reports\github-context\pr-671\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@\n+\"\"\"Append-only decision ledger for the Dealix Now engine.\n+\n+Every founder decision on a draft (approve / reject / any note) is recorded as\n+one JSONL line. ``approve`` / ``reject`` ONLY log and return a result dict —\n+they never send anything. ``approve`` returns founder-operated ``mailto`` and\n+``whatsapp`` deep links (URL-encoded from the draft subject/body) so the\n+founder can send manually. Dealix never auto-sends (doctrine rule 5 + agent\n+interaction rule 1).\n+\n+JSONL store with env override, mirroring ``value_os/value_ledger.py`` and\n+``payment_ops/renewal_scheduler.py``: path from ``DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH``,\n+default ``var/now_ledger.jsonl`` (``var/`` is gitignored).\n+\n+Pure I/O + string building: no network, no API keys, no LLM.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import logging\n+import os\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from urllib.parse import quote\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+_DEFAULT_PATH = \"var/now_ledger.jsonl\"\n+\n+APPROVED_STATUS = \"approved — ready to send by founder (Dealix never auto-sends)\"\n+REJECTED_STATUS = \"rejected — archived, nothing sent\"\n+\n+VALID_DECISIONS = frozenset({\"approved\", \"rejected\", \"noted\"})\n+\n+\n+def _ledger_path() -> Path:\n+    raw = os.getenv(\"DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH\", _DEFAULT_PATH)\n+    path = Path(raw)\n+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return path\n+\n+\n+def _now_iso() -> str:\n+    return datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+\n+\n+def _find_latest(draft_id: str) -> dict | None:\n+    \"\"\"Return the most recent ledger record for ``draft_id``, or ``None``.\"\"\"\n+    latest: dict | None = None\n+    for rec in list_decisions():\n+        if rec.get(\"draft_id\") == draft_id:\n+            latest = rec\n+    return latest\n+\n+\n+def record_decision(\n+    draft_id: str,\n+    decision: str,\n+    actor: str = \"founder\",\n+    note: str = \"\",\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Append one decision record and return it.\n+\n+    ``decision`` is normalized; unknown values are stored as ``noted`` so the\n+    log never silently drops an action.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    normalized = decision.strip().lower()\n+    if normalized not in VALID_DECISIONS:\n+        normalized = \"noted\"\n+    record = {\n+        \"draft_id\": str(draft_id),\n+        \"decision\": normalized,\n+        \"actor\": str(actor or \"founder\"),\n+        \"note\": str(note or \"\"),\n+        \"logged_at\": _now_iso(),\n+    }\n+    path = _ledger_path()\n+    with path.open(\"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n+        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False))\n+        handle.write(\"\\n\")\n+    log.info(\"now_decision_recorded draft_id=%s decision=%s actor=%s\", draft_id, normalized, actor)",

.\reports\github-context\pr-671\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Now — تشغيل الشركة الآن\n\nBridges the gap between Dealix's already-deep engine and its website. The backend has 900+ routes and a real lead/scoring/draft engine; the doctrine (`os/`) is fully specified — but the website did not surface any live operating output, and `os/05_SCORING.yml` was never wired to code. This PR closes both gaps with one coherent, **deterministic, key-free** slice that makes the company runnable daily.\n\n### What this delivers\n- **`/ar/now` — Founder Operating Console** (Arabic RTL): today's operating pack — metrics, top‑3 priorities, scored leads with tier badges, and outreach **drafts awaiting founder approval**. Approving only *prepares* the message (mailto / WhatsApp deep links); **nothing is auto-sent**. Honors the doctrine: *AI يكتب، أنت ترسل*.\n- **`/ar/services`** — full productized catalog (10 offers from `os/03_OFFERS.yml`) with SAR pricing + CTAs.\n- **`dealix/now/` engine** *(landing in this branch)* — deterministic: loads repo lead data, scores per `os/05_SCORING.yml` (finally wired to code), routes the offer per `os/01_CLAUDE.md`, writes approval-first drafts (≤150 words, one pain, one CTA, no pricing), runs the Email Safety check, assembles the Founder Daily Brief (`os/10`), and logs every approve/reject to an append-only ledger.\n- **`/api/v1/now/*`** public read API + **`scripts/dealix_now_daily.py`** for the daily brief, with doctrine-enforcing tests.\n\n### Doctrine compliance (11 non-negotiables)\n- ✅ No auto-send — drafts only; `status = \"draft — awaiting founder approval\"`.\n- ✅ No scraping — sourced from committed repo data only.\n- ✅ Approval-first — founder approves, then sends manually.\n- ✅ Every decision logged. ✅ No secrets, no LLM keys required (fully deterministic).\n\n### Notes\n- `apps/web/lib/*` was force-added: the repo-wide `.gitignore` `lib/` rule (a Python build-artifact convention) was silently hiding the web app's source `lib/` dir, which would break a clean CI build.\n- Frontend builds green (29/29 static pages). The console fetches the live API and falls back to a committed static `/now-pack.json`, so the site works with or without a backend.\n\nDraft — backend engine commit lands next on this branch; will mark ready once tests are green here.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH)_",

It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,",

hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+ Status: **approval_required**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"القطاع / Sector: {req.sector}\",\n+        ]\n+        if req.stakeholders:\n+            lines.append(f\"أصحاب القرار / .\reports\github-context\pr-701\detail.json:9:  "body": "## ما الذي يفعله هذا الـ PR / What this does\n\nيرفع Dealix إلى **شركة أنظمة تحوّل (Transformation Systems)** — لكن **بالطريقة المحكومة**: دمج في الكتالوج الموحّد والمعمارية ذات الطبقات الخمس، بدل سايلو منفصل يكسر CI والدكترين.\n\nElevates Dealix into a Transformation Systems company **the governed way** — integrated into the canonical catalog and 5-plane architecture, not a parallel silo.\n\n### لماذا ليس سكربت الـ silo / Why not the original script\nThe originally-proposed `transformation_os/` tree (duplicate YAML catalog + standalone proposal generator + flat price list) would have **broken CI** (the `exactly-7` catalog test + `count==7` JSON test), **duplicated the single source of truth** (`registry.py`, Article 11), and **bypassed the 10 doctrine non-negotiables**. This PR delivers the same vision through the existing governed surfaces instead.\n\n## التغييرات / Changes\n\n**Catalog (single source of truth):**\n- `ServiceOffering` gains optional setup/monthly range fields + a `\"transformation\"` journey stage (the 7 core offerings are unchanged).\n- 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings added → registry **7 → 17**: AI Command Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance, Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System. Prices are **estimate ranges** (`is_estimate=True`).\n- All 10 wired into `commercial_map` (`_WIRING`/`_OFFER_NOTES`), founder-issued checkout.\n- Regenerated `landing/assets/data/services-catalog.json` (count 17).\n\n**Doctrine-safe by construction:**\n- No `live_send`/`live_charge`; every offering's `hard_gates` include `no_cold_whatsapp`, `no_scraping`, `no_fake_proof`.\n- **Growth Engine OS** is draft-only/approval-gated (no cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no blast, no scraping) — verified by a dedicated test.\n- No `\"guaranteed\"/\"نضمن\"` anywhere (token-scanned).\n\n**Governed, stateless generators** (read prices from the catalog, approval-gated, estimate-stamped, bilingual AR+EN):\n- `dealix/commercial/transformation_proposal.py`\n- `dealix/commercial/roi_calculator.py`\n- `api/routers/commercial.py`: `POST /api/v1/commercial/transformation-proposal/generate(/markdown)`, `POST /api/v1/commercial/roi/estimate`.\n\n**Tests:** count `7→17` in `test_service_catalog` + `test_wave15_customer_journey_e2e`; ladder test scoped to the core funnel; new catalog/proposal/router/ROI tests.\n\n**Docs:** Transformation OS master positioning (AR+EN), 4-front roadmap, and `enterprise_package/` MSA · DPA · ROI worksheet · multi-stakeholder playbook. `no_overclaim` register updated.\n\n## ملاحظات / Notes\n- **Service Readiness Matrix intentionally untouched** — it's a decoupled 32-row taxonomy count-locked by its own tests; expanding it is a documented roadmap item.\n- **Roadmap (future PRs):** security hardening (existing `scorecard.yml` remediation), enterprise trust pack, proposal/ROI persistence, brand/identity OS.\n\n## التحقق / Verification\n- 138 relevant tests pass (catalog, transformation, proposal, ROI, router, doctrine guards, commercial chain, wave15, commercial-map).\n- `compileall` across all CI packages: OK. .\docs\gtm\whatsapp\WHATSAPP_POST_REPLY_FLOW_AR.md:9:واتساب في دِيلكس قناة **بعد الرد / بموافقة فقط**. لا تبدأ محادثة واتساب إلا بعد أن **يرد** العميل المحتمل إيجابيًا على بريد اعتمده المؤسس، ثم **يطلب** هو متابعة عبر واتساب أو يوافق عليها صراحةً. هذا يُكافئ بوابة opt-in في [`auto_client_acquisition/whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py`](../../../auto_client_acquisition/whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py) حيث `can_ever_live_send()` يعيد `False` دائمًا لهذه الطبقة، ويُحجب أي نمط «رسالة جماعية / قائمة مشتراة / cold whatsapp».
.\docs\gtm\whatsapp\WHATSAPP_POST_REPLY_FLOW_AR.md:18:WhatsApp at Dealix is a **post-reply / consent-only** channel. A WhatsApp conversation begins only after a prospect **replies** positively to a founder-approved email and then **asks for**, or explicitly consents to, a WhatsApp follow-up. This mirrors the opt-in gate in [`whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py`](../../../auto_client_acquisition/whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py), where `can_ever_live_send()` always returns `False` for this layer and any "broadcast / purchased list / cold whatsapp" pattern is blocked.

.\docs\gtm\signals\SIGNAL_OS_AR.md:7:كل إشارة في `auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/records.py` (`CompanySignal`, ثابتا `SIGNAL_TYPES` و`SIGNAL_SOURCES`) هي **ملاحظة مُدخَلة من المؤسس أو من مصدر عام فقط**. لا scraping، ولا جمع ويب غير مصرّح، ولا قوائم مشتراة — بند غير قابل للتفاوض. أي بحث عن شركة على LinkedIn يكون **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** فقط. كل سجل خالٍ من PII: الشركة `company_label` (لا اسم شخص)، والدور دور لا اسم، ويولد بـ `governance_decision = "approval_required"`.
.\docs\gtm\signals\SIGNAL_OS_AR.md:11:Every signal in `auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/records.py` (`CompanySignal`, the `SIGNAL_TYPES` and `SIGNAL_SOURCES` constants) is a **founder-input or public observation only**. No scraping, no unauthorized web collection, no purchased lists — non-negotiable. Any LinkedIn lookup is **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** only. Every record is PII-free: the company is a `company_label` (never a person's name), the role is a role not a name, and it is born with `governance_decision = "approval_required"`.

.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:11:Every inbound reply to an **approved** send is classified, then routed to an action. Classification and routing live in `auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/records.py` (`Reply`, `route_reply`, the `REPLY_CLASSES` constant), fed by the classifier in `auto_client_acquisition/email/reply_classifier.py`. Every `Reply` record is PII-free (via `prospect_ref` and `draft_ref`) and is born with `governance_decision = "approval_required"`: routing is a suggestion for the founder, not an automatic act. .\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:9:كل مسودة في هذه الطبقة تولد بـ `governance_decision = "approval_required"`. اجتياز بوابة الجودة لا يعني الإرسال — يعني فقط أن المسودة **جاهزة لإنسان**. القرار النهائي (إرسال، تسعير، التزام، تسليم دفع) **للمؤسس وحده**، اتساقًا مع المبدأ في [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml): أي إجراء يؤثر على الخارج أو على بيانات حقيقية أو على التزامات تجارية يتوقف تلقائيًا حتى موافقة صريحة.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:13:Every draft in this layer is born `governance_decision = "approval_required"`. Passing the quality gate is not a send — it only means the draft is **ready for a human**. The final decision (send, pricing, commitment, payment handoff) belongs to the **founder alone**, consistent with [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml): any action that affects the outside world, real data, or commercial commitments halts automatically until explicit approval.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:19:المسودة تصبح مؤهَّلة للطابور فقط حين تجتاز **كل** سطر في [`auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py`](../../auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py) عبر `validate_outreach_draft()`. الناجحة تُرجِع `verdict = "pass"` و`governance_decision = "approval_required"`؛ الفاشلة تُرجِع `"BLOCK"` (أعد الصياغة قبل إعادة الإدراج). التفاصيل الكاملة لأكواد الحجب في [`outreach/COLD_EMAIL_DRAFT_FACTORY_AR.md`](outreach/COLD_EMAIL_DRAFT_FACTORY_AR.md) — لا نكرّرها هنا.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:25:A draft becomes queue-eligible only when it passes **every** line of [`gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py`](../../auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py) via `validate_outreach_draft()`. .\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:61:For each queue item the founder picks one decision; nothing is auto-decided. Decisions flow through the approval center (`approval_policy`, `founder_rules`, `approval_store`) in [`approval_center/`](../../auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/). Each is logged with a timestamp and reference for a full audit trail. Decisions that return a draft to the factory (Rewrite / Shorten / Make formal / Change offer) re-run the quality gate before re-queueing. `Do not contact` is terminal.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:71:This layer's queue does not replace the institutional approval gates; it sits on top of them. The gate registry in [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml) forces human approval on high-risk decisions — including the first email to a company (`G01`), follow-ups (`G02`), sharing a price (`G03`), sending a proposal (`G04`), and running any externally-facing automation (`G09`). Approving a draft here means satisfying the relevant gate, never bypassing it. Override authority is founder-only.

.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:15:Vision 2030 is not a slogan — it is a measurable national roadmap with defined KPIs binding ministries, sovereign funds, and private companies. When Dealix presents to a government or institutional audience, the counterpart is looking for one answer: how does this solution accelerate our declared targets? This document provides that answer — anchored to published policy, free of overclaim.
.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:28:**SME Digitization Pillar — English summary:** The SME Development Program (Monsha'at) targets raising SME GDP contribution from 20% to 35%. The operational gap is not tool ownership — surveys show high software purchase rates — but genuine operational adoption. Dealix addresses this gap directly: it activates existing tools rather than adding new ones, reducing the adoption friction that stalls digitization impact.
.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:44:**المصدر:** نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL)، الهيئة السعودية للبيانات والذكاء الاصطناعي (سدايا) — متطلبات الحوكمة والشفافية في التعامل مع بيانات العملاء.
.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:46:**المشكلة التشغيلية الموثّقة:** معظم الشركات الصغيرة والمتوسطة لا تعرف بالضبط أين تُخزَّن بيانات عملائها، ولا كيف تُعالَج، ولا من يصل إليها. هذا يُشكّل مخاطر امتثال حقيقية مع تصاعد تطبيق PDPL.
.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:48:**ما يقدّمه Dealix:** تشغيل البيانات بشفافية — كل عملية موثّقة، كل وصول مُسجَّل، كل مسودة تحتاج موافقة قبل الإرسال. هذا التصميم يتوافق مع متطلبات PDPL ويُنشئ سجلات تدقيق واضحة.
.\docs\strategy\VISION_2030_ALIGNMENT_NARRATIVE_AR.md:50:**Data Governance — English summary:** PDPL enforcement is accelerating. Most SMEs cannot answer basic governance questions about where customer data is stored or who accesses it. Dealix's approval-gate architecture creates an inherent audit trail — every draft approved, every access logged — aligning with PDPL's transparency and accountability requirements without requiring the company to hire a dedicated compliance officer.
